en: Any other requests? Girl in the front.
I ran. I ran. A fantastic suggestion.
All right, piano man, tickle those ivories. Let's hit it.
ko: 좋아, 피아노 남자, 건반을 만져봐. 시작하자.

en: That's right. I walk along the avenue
I never thought I'd meet a girl like you
ko: 너 같은 소녀를 만날 줄은 몰랐어.

en: With all the hair and tawny eyes
The kind of eyes that hypnotize me through
ko: 나를 최면에 걸리게 하는 그런 눈.

en: That hypnotize me through And I ran
I ran so far away I couldn't get away
